headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Robinhood Markets (HOOD) After Recent Retail Trading Headlines?
summary: If you are wondering whether Robinhood Markets at around US$69.78 is still offering value or if most of the easy gains are already on the table, this article breaks down what the current price might really imply. The stock has moved 7.1% over the past week, has a 1 year return of 97.1%, and shows a very large 3 year gain, while also carrying a 30 day return of a 9.5% decline and a year to date return of a 39.4% decline. Recent headlines have focused on Robinhood's role in retail trading...
